meaning: n.东莨菪碱(一种植物碱),由莨菪萃取而得,供药用,由镇静神经之效
examples: While this is a highly toxic plant, it also has its benefits. The medical alkaloids atropine, scopolamine, hyoscyamine, hyoscine, and belladonna also come from this plant.
Compared with the results of the treatment of the other 39 cases in whom hyoscine was not employed, the hyoscine treatment was far better in handling repeated apnea and convulsion caused by HIE.
